title: AI at the Edge: The Real State of Play - OSes
subtitle: Part 1: Client Operating Systems
author: Keith Szot
seriesTitle: AI at the Edge: The Real State of Play
description: A grounded analysis of client operating systems for edge AI, comparing GMS Android, AOSP, Linux, Jetson, Apple platforms, ChromeOS, Windows, and specialized OS environments through the lens of control, deployment, and long-term operational reality.
